issue_title: fix: add content type to preview server
issue_body_preview:
## Summary/ Motivation (TLDR;)

This allows `jest-preview` to be used in GitHub Codespaces and probably fixes other problems.

The preview server was not setting the content type header in the response.
Somehow this does not cause any problems when running in `localhost`, but it
seems like it preven
test_description_zh: 在非 localhost 环境（如 GitHub Codespaces 等远程开发环境）中启动 jest-preview 预览服务器，打开预览页面，观察页面中的 CSS 样式、图片、HTML 内容是否正常渲染。
expected_result_zh: 预览页面应正确加载并渲染所有资源（HTML、CSS、图片等），浏览器能正确识别各资源的内容类型，页面样式和内容显示正常，不出现因 Content-Type 缺失导致的资源加载失败或样式丢失问题。
